mechanism_narrative: Sustained policy rates near zero compress equity discount rates, directly increasing present values of future cash flows and generating positive S&P 500 returns over the next month.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns are negative in >60% of low-rate months.

mechanism_narrative: Unemployment rates exceeding 9.5 percent signal severe labor market slack that suppresses consumer spending and corporate earnings, producing negative equity returns over the next quarter.
failure_condition: Positive 60-day returns occur in >65% of months where UNRATE exceeds 9.5%, or signal loses predictive power during expansion phases.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous month-over-month expansion in real retail sales and housing starts confirms broad-based demand recovery, driving positive equity momentum over the next month.
failure_condition: Co-movement of RSAFS and HOUST fails to predict direction with Rank IC > 0.05 over rolling 3-year windows, or joint expansion coincides with negative returns.

mechanism_narrative: Month-over-month industrial production acceleration above 0.5 percent signals immediate capacity utilization improvements and rising corporate revenues, triggering positive short-term equity rallies.
failure_condition: 5-day forward returns are negative in >70% of instances following INDPRO acceleration, or signal reverses during inventory drawdown phases.

mechanism_narrative: Ultra-low policy rates combined with rising inflation expectations compress real yields, creating a favorable discount rate environment that supports higher equity valuations over a quarter.
failure_condition: Real yields remain positive or inflation expectations collapse, causing negative 60-day returns despite low nominal rates, or interaction term loses significance.

mechanism_narrative: Positive month-over-month growth in total nonfarm payrolls increases aggregate household income and consumption capacity, generating positive equity returns over the next month.
failure_condition: PAYEMS growth consistently fails to correlate with 20-day forward returns (Rank IC < 0.02) across multiple business cycles or structural breaks.

mechanism_narrative: Quarterly GDP growth exceeding 2.0 percent annualized confirms sustained economic expansion, eliminating recession risk premiums and lifting equity valuations over the next month.
failure_condition: GDP prints above 2.0% are followed by negative 20-day equity returns in >60% of observations, or signal fails during stagflation episodes.

mechanism_narrative: Rising industrial output alongside stagnant employment indicates productivity-driven efficiency gains that compress labor costs and boost near-term corporate profit margins.
failure_condition: Productivity divergence coincides with negative 5-day returns in >65% of cases, or margin expansion fails to materialize despite output growth.
